creator: joel@tahoestores.com
text:
My last successful build of wazuh-manager was 4.4.3

After my upgrade to openssl-3 this port has failed to build.

I get the following error prior to make termination:

ld: error: ./libpython3.9.so: undefined reference to SSL_get1_peer_certificate [--no-allow-shlib-undefined]

FreeBSD 12.4-RELEASE-p9 GENERIC

I am not sure what to make of this since ./libpython3.9.so is local and not the installed version.

Please advise.
